evidence_summary: Heighten the stakes through personal tragedy and physical desperation.
As oxygen levels plummet, the royal family retreats to a sunken garden. Dejah Thoris falls into a coma due to asphyxiation, leaving John Carter in a state of desperate grief and isolation.
Low-angle shots of the dying environment
heavy use of shallow depth of field to simulate disorientation.
